purpose: E2E regression sentinel for the unified MLS application-rumor dispatcher. Verifies that an own-send chat message produces exactly one IDB row and exactly one rendered bubble, confirming the structural invariant that exactly one group.on('applicationMessage') subscriber exists in production code.
test_targets: AC-AR-21: own-send produces exactly one IDB row and one rendered bubble
AC-AR-21: peer sees exactly one bubble
AC-AR-22: onChatIdbWrite counter equals 1 after own-send (optimistic write only)
